app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Balance_Receive_AddressFormat_Recommende: The Cash Address format is preferred for receiving Bitcoin Cash (BCH) due to its improved user experience and compatibility. However, both address formats can be used interchangeably to receive BCH, regardless of the sender\'s address format.

The Native SegWit format is preferred in Bitcoin for improved throughput and security. All address formats (Taproot, SegWit, Legacy) can be used interchangeably to receive BTC regardless of the sender\'s address format, enabling seamless transactions across different coin types.

app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.BtcBlockchainSettings_TransactionInputsO:
Most Bitcoin transactions, as well as transactions in alike cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin Cash, Dash, and Litecoin, generate two outputs. One output is the amount that goes to the receiver and the other is the change output that is returned to the sender. The way most wallets construct transactions makes it easy for a third party to understand which of the outputs went to the receiving party and which one was the change amount returned to the sender. As the output returned to the sender is later used in future transactions, a connection between these two transactions becomes apparent.


The Unstoppable wallet implements measures to make it harder for someone to figure out which output goes where.


There are two options available to Unstoppable users:


1. Shuffle: The order of transaction outputs is randomized on every transaction. Sometimes change can be the first output, sometimes it can be the second. If a user trusts the developer of the app, then consider this a recommended option.


2. Deterministic: There is a commonly agreed standard for ordering transaction outputs (known as BIP69). In open-source wallets, that standard ensures wallet users do not need to trust how developers of the app implement the ordering of the outputs. As this standard is new, not many wallets have implemented it yet. As a result, it's somewhat possible to see on the blockchain whether a transaction was sent from a wallet that uses that standard or not.
Make your %s transaction harder to trace by changing the way transaction is structured.

app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.CoinPage_EmaSettingsDescription:
The EMA, SMA, and WMA are moving averages used in technical analysis:

EMA emphasizes recent prices for quicker reactions.
SMA averages price data for a general trend view.
WMA balances sensitivity and noise reduction by linearly weighting recent data.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.CoinPage_IndicatorsAlertText: Indicators available only for Unstoppable Wallet premium users.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.CoinPage_MacdSettingsDescription: The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is a momentum indicator that tracks the relationship between two EMAs of a security\'s price. It signals buying or selling opportunities when the MACD line (12-period EMA minus 26-period EMA) crosses the 9-period EMA, known as the signal line.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.CoinPage_RsiSettingsDescription: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is a momentum oscillator that measures price speed and change, identifying overbought (above 70) or oversold (below 30) market conditions. It can also detect price reversals through divergences.

app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.EthereumTransaction_Error_InsufficientBa: The current %s balance is below the amount required to process this transaction, including the transaction fee.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.EthereumTransaction_Error_InsufficientLi: Likely there is not enough liquidity available to process this trade. Try lowering the amount.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.EthereumTransaction_Error_LowerThanBaseG: The set transaction fee amount is insufficient for processing this transaction now.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.EthereumTransaction_Warning_CoinNeededFo: Consider leaving some %s on balance to be able to pay for future transactions.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeInfo_AverageDescription: Typically, the recommended fee value should be sufficient for a transaction to be processed within minutes or an hour for Bitcoin and within minutes for Ethereum.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeInfo_Description: Both Bitcoin and Ethereum blockchains require users to pay network fees when sending transactions. The fees are higher when a lot of transactions are taking place on the network and lower when the blockchain is less busy.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeInfo_FastDescription: For transactions where priority is important, we recommend using the high fee value. It\'s expected to be sufficient for a transaction to be completed within 10 minutes for Bitcoin and within 1-2 minutes for Ethereum.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeInfo_SlowDescription: Selecting a value from this range may result in a transaction being held as pending for hours, or being rejected. The lower the value, the longer it will take for the transaction to confirm.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeInfo_TronActivationFee_Description: This address is not active. Transferring TRX or TRC-10 tokens to an inactive account address will activate the account.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeInfo_TronFee_Description: The estimated cost of sending given transaction on the network. (Without excluding Energy, Bandwidth and Activating Fee)
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeInfo_TronResourcesConsumed_Descriptio:
Bandwidth is the unit that measures the size of the transaction bytes stored in the blockchain database. The larger the transaction, the more bandwidth resources will be consumed.

Energy is the unit that measures the amount of computation required by the TRON virtual machine to perform specific operations on the TRON network.

Since smart contract transactions require computing resources to execute, each smart contract transaction requires to pay for the energy fee.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_BaseFee_Info: The network protocol determines the base price per gas for each block, called base fee rate. It varies according to the network utilization level from block to block. It can increase or decrease by no more than 12.5% in the next block, making fees more predictable. The value shown here is the current block\'s base fee rate.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_FeeRate_Info:
When sending a transaction, you must pay a network fee. The busier the network, the higher the fee.
        

Unstoppable Wallet suggests an optimal fee to help your transaction confirm in a reasonable time. You can increase or decrease this value.
        

Setting the fee too low may cause your transaction to stay pending for a long time or even be rejected. For faster confirmation, use a higher fee.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_FeeRate_RecommendedInfo: Here is the recommended value for hitting the next 2 blocks
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_GasLimit_Info: Transaction complexity is measured in units called \"gas\". It varies depending on the smart contract being executed. The Gas Limit is the estimated maximum gas needed to execute it. The actual gas used will normally be lower.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_GasPrice_Info: The fee for transacting on the network is measured in gas units. Gas Price is the amount a user is willing to spend per unit of gas. When the network is busy, gas prices are high, and low when it\'s idle. An insufficient gas price is often a reason for a transaction to remain pending for an extended period.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_MaxFee_Info: This is the maximum total price per gas the user is willing to pay. It must cover the network\'s base fee rate and max priority fee rate. The value shown here is suggested based on an estimate of the next block\'s base fee rate plus the max priority fee rate chosen by the user. The actual fee rate paid will normally be lower. Setting this lower than the current base fee rate will limit the fee paid, but will result in longer waiting times for the transaction to be confirmed, or even in a stuck transaction.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_MaxMinerTips_Info: Users pay priority fees to incentivize a transaction to be confirmed more quickly. They are sometimes called tips. The max priority fee rate is the maximum additional price per gas the user is willing to pay on top of the base fee rate. The value shown here is suggested based on predicted network conditions. The actual priority fee will normally be lower. Setting this to zero may result in a long waiting time for transaction to be confirmed, as it is placed at the end of the pending transactions queue from all users.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_NetworkFee_Info: The estimated cost of sending given transaction on the network.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_Overpricing: The set transaction fee is higher than necessary for processing this transaction now.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_RiskOfGettingStuck: To ensure speedy execution of the transaction the max fee rate (subtracted max. miner tip) should be higher than current base fee rate. If not transaction may remain pending until condition is met.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.FeeSettings_RiskOfGettingStuckLegacy: The transaction may remain pending for a while or fail entirely.

app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Info_LockTime_Description: The sender sent these funds with a spending lock that will expire on %s.\n\nNo worries, the received Bitcoins are already yours, but until the lock period expires you can not spend them on the Bitcoin network.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Info_LockTime_NoDateDescription: The sender sent these funds with a spending lock that will expire on the shown date.\n\nNo worries, the received Bitcoins are already yours, but until the lock period expires you can not spend them on the Bitcoin network.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Info_NotRelayed_Description: The transaction holding this amount is broadcasted but not yet accepted by the network.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Info_ProcessingBalance_Description: Transactions with this amount still syncing. And when they are confirmed, these tokens will be available for spending
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Info_Reserved_Description: The Stellar network locks 1 XLM to activate the wallet and 0.5 XLM as a reserve for each token activated in your wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Intro_Wallet_Screen2Description: Don\'t lock yourself in and don\'t let others do that to you.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Intro_Wallet_Screen3Description: Bypass conditional barriers and access markets globally.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Intro_Wallet_Screen4Description: Do not leak your private and financial data to the world.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.LocalBackup_DontForgetPasswordWarning: This password is used to encrypt backup file of your wallet. It can\'t be recovered or reset if lost or forgotten.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.LocalBackup_PasswordInvalid: At least 8 characters, including one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one symbol.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.LocalBackup_ProtextBackupWithPasswordInf: Set unlock password for your backup. It must consist of at least 8 symbols and include at least one lowercase letter, uppercase letter, number and a special character.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.LocalBackup_Term1: I understand that theft or damage of a backup device will result in loss of a backup to a respective wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.LocalBackup_TermsWarningText: Storage devices i.e. hard drives, USB drives , storage on smartphone etc. are all vulnerable to loss due to physical damage, theft or other unforeseen circumstances.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageAccount_BackupRequired_Description: You need to backup %1$s before you may receive %2$s.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageAccount_DeleteWarning: Do you want to stop watching this wallet address?
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageAccount_Delete_ConfirmationLose: If you didn\'t backup the private key for this wallet, you will lose access to your funds.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageAccount_Delete_ConfirmationRemove: This action will delete the selected wallet from this device.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageAccounts_CreateNewWalletDescriptio: Create a new wallet to get started or add a new one.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageAccounts_ExistingWalletDescription: Import your wallet if you already have one to continue using it.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageAccounts_ViewOnlyWalletDescription: View a wallet by address without access to funds.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageCoins_BchTypeDescription:
There are 2 address formats Bitcoin Cash wallets can use to receive incoming payments:
\n
\n- TYPE0 (older)
\n- TYPE145 (newer)
\n
\nWhile Unstoppable wallet supports both of them it recommends to use a Bitcoin Cash wallet operating in TYPE145 format.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ManageCoins_BipsDescription:
There are 4 common address formats %1$s wallets can use to receive incoming payments:
\n
\n- BIP-44 (older)
\n- BIP-49
\n- BIP-84 (recommended)
\n- BIP-86 (newest)
\n
\nWhile Unstoppable wallet supports all 4 of them it recommends to use a %2$s wallet operating in BIP-84 format. The wallets operating in this format get to pay lowest fees when sending %3$s transactions.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.MarketEtf_EtfDescription: Net inflow of all %s ETFs, including spot and futures-based funds.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.MarketGlobalMetrics_NoCoin: This project doesn\'t have a coin
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.MarketGlobalMetrics_TotalMarketCapDescri: Total market value of all cryptocurrencies
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.MarketGlobalMetrics_VolumeDescription: The 24h trading volume of the crypto market
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.MarketPlatformCoins_PlatformEcosystemDes: Market cap of all protocols on the %s chain
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Filter_GoodDistribution_Descripti: Overall Score is Good or Excellent
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Filter_SolidCex_Description: Overall Score is Good or Excellent
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Filter_SolidDex_Description: Overall Score is Good or Excellent
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Signal_Buy_Description: Likely price increase in near future.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Signal_Description: Below signals are based on the Bollinger Bands and RSI technical price indicators over approx. the last 30 days. These signals are algorithmic and can change frequently.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Signal_Neutral_Descripion: No clear trend, market is in equilibrium.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Signal_Sell_Description: Likely price decrease in near future.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Signal_Warning: Always remember to apply risk management, and note that this is not financial advice.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Market_Vaults_WantToUnlockPremium: Explore the best DeFi staking returns, all in one place.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.MoneroNodeSettings_Description: Choose the node Unstoppable app should use for synchronizing wallet(s).
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.MoneroNodeSettings_TrustedDescription:
Trusted node — the wallet trusts the selected node and uses its data without extra verification.
        

On → transactions instantly appear as Pending when broadcast (faster sync, but lower privacy and reliance on the node).
        

Off → transactions are shown only after confirmations from the network (slower, but safer and more private).
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.OSPin_Confirm_Desciption:
This app requires that phone has the passcode (screen lock) enabled.

 You may enable it in Android settings.

Please note that when you disabled the PIN on the OS level the security measures in safe storage of your phonе made the previously stored data invalid. You will need to Restore your wallet keys to get back to your wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.OSPin_Prompt_Desciption: This app requires your phone\'s PIN in order to keep sensitive data from your wallet in Android\'s secure storage and not in the app itself.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PasskeyTerms_DeviceDependency_Descriptio: Access requires your device. Losing access may result in loss of funds.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PasskeyTerms_LimitedAccess_Description: May not work on all devices or platforms.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PasskeyTerms_Responsibility_Description: You are responsible for access to your device. Unstoppable cannot recover this wallet if access is lost.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PinSet_ErrorFailedToSavePin: Error occurred while saving your passcode. Please, try again.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PinSet_ErrorPinInUse: This passcode is already being used.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PinSet_ErrorPinsDontMatch: Passcode did not match. Try again.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PinSet_ForBiometrics: Set a passcode to enable Biometrics
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PinSet_ForDuress: Set a passcode to enable Duress Mode
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PinSet_Info: Your passcode will be used to unlock your wallet
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_Banner_BlackFridayText: Upgrade your experience with Premium features!
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_CancelSubscriptionInfo: You can cancel your Play Store subscription at any time.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_EnjoyFullPowerOfTheApp: Enjoy the full power of the app.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_HighlyRatedSecurity: Highly rated security, exceptional privacy, and a truly non-custodial wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_OnePurchaseUnlocksAllPremium: One purchase unlocks all Premium features.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_AdvancedSearch_Bi: Find tokens with filters by volume, chain, or sector. Includes metrics for CEX/DEX activity and listings.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_AdvancedSearch_De: Powerful filters for smarter token discovery.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_PrioritySupport_B: Gives you direct access to priority support. Get fast, personal help from the Unstoppable team.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_PrioritySupport_D: Direct access to our support team.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_RobberyProtection: Lets you create a decoy wallet with a separate PIN. Keeps real assets hidden in high-risk situations.
Safeguards your funds if you’re forced to unlock the app.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_ScamProtection_Bi: Detects fake or malicious dApps before connection. Prevents phishing and keeps your assets safe.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_ScamProtection_De: Warns you when connecting to fake or malicious dApps.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_SecureSend_BigDes: Checks recipient wallets for phishing or fraud. Alerts you before sending to risky addresses.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_SecureSend_Descri: Prevents sending funds to risky or phishing addresses.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_SwapProtection_Bi: Stops bots and front-running attacks during swaps. Keeps your transactions fair and secure.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_SwapProtection_De: Prevents bots and MEV attacks during swaps.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_TokenInsights_Big: Shows detailed token data — volume, liquidity, and trends. Helps you make smarter investment decisions.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_TradeSignals_BigD: Sends real-time alerts on trading opportunities. Highlights profit chances or market risks instantly.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Premium_UpgradeFeature_TradeSignals_Desc: Actionable signals for more confident trading.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Privacy_Information: Unstoppable doesn\'t collect personal data like your balances or wallet addresses. We only use anonymous data to improve the app.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PrivateKeys_AccountExtendedPrivateKeyDes: Grants full control over Bitcoin and other UTXO-based assets (e.g., Litecoin, Bitcoin Cash, Dash) within this wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PrivateKeys_Bip32RootKeyDescription: The master private key of the wallet. Grants full control over all derived accounts and assets.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PrivateKeys_EvmPrivateKeyDescription: Grants full control over assets on EVM-based networks (e.g., Ethereum, BNB Smart Chain, Polygon, Avalanche) within this wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PrivateKeys_MoneroPrivateKeyDescription: Grants full control over Monero (XMR) assets within this wallet, including the ability to spend funds.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PrivateKeys_NeverShareWarning: Never share this key with anyone. Unstoppable Wallet support team will never ask for it.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PrivateKeys_StellarSecretKeyDescription: Grants full control over assets on the Stellar network within this wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PrivateKeys_TronPrivateKeyDescription: Grants full control over assets on TRON network within this wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ProUsersActivate_Description: Mountain Yak - Go borderless. Will show you important market data, analytical tools, useful charts based on on-chain data that will help give you a clear view of projects
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ProUsersInfo_Description: To enable this data you should get bronze level UW NFTs “Coin Info+”\n\nAlso you get access to data below:
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PublicKeys_AccountExtendedPublicKeyDescr: Allows read-only monitoring of wallets holding Bitcoin and other UTXO based crypto (i.e Litecoin, Bitcoin Cash, Dash etc.).
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PublicKeys_EvmAddress_Description: Allows read-only monitoring of wallets holding assets on Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain and other EVM based blockchains.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PublicKeys_MoneroPublicKeyDescription: Allows read-only monitoring of wallets holding Monero (XMR) assets without granting spending access.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.PublicKeys_TronAddress_Description: Allows read-only monitoring of wallet holding assets on TRON blockchain.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RateApp_Description_Rate_This_App: Enjoying Unstoppable? Share feedback and ideas to take it further.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RecoveryPhraseVerify_Description: Select requested words from your wallet recovery phrase
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RecoveryPhrase_Description: Write these words down in order and keep them safe.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Restore_Error_MnemonicWordCount: Recovery phrase must contain at least 12 words.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Restore_NonStandard_Description: This page provides a special wallet restore mechanism to Unstoppable users who have a non-standard wallet. Such wallets might have been created in Unstoppable version 0.27 - 0.28 using a non-English recovery phrase and/or a special character in the wallet passphrase (i.e. diacritic symbol).\n\nIf you\'re an affected user then your wallet balance will be shown 0 after restoring such wallet in version 0.29 or above. This page will enable you to restore access to your non-standard wallet. Once restored you\'re recommended to create a new wallet (which will be standard compliant) and move funds there.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Restore_PassphraseDescription: If you used a passphrase, enter it here. Using a different one will create a new wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Restore_PrivateKeyHint: Enter EVM Private Key, TRON Private Key, BIP32 Root Key, Stellar Secret Key or Account Extended Private Key
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RiskLevel_Auto_Description: Automatic on-chain execution. Funds cannot be frozen or blocked after submission. If swap fails the funds are refunded automatically.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RiskLevel_Controlled_Description: These provider operates with third party liquidity and has AML policies in place. In most cases swaps are rejected and refunded if any AML issues are detected. In some situations provider may request KYC before releasing funds.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RiskLevel_Flexible_Description: Provider operates using their own liquidity. Rejections are rare. Freezes are theoretically possible but highly unlikely.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RiskLevel_Precheck_Description: Provider does its own address screening prior processing swap. Rejections are rare. Freezes are theoretically possible but highly unlikely.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.RiskLevel_ProviderRiskLevel_Description: The labels below explain different risk levels of swap providers. Choose accordingly.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ScanQr_CameraPermissionDeniedText: Access to your camera for this app was denied, you can go to settings and allow access
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SecureSend_Config_BlacklistCheckDescript: Checks the address against fraud and high-risk databases.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SecureSend_Config_PhishingCheckDescripti: Detects suspicious addresses before confirming the transfer.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SecureSend_Config_SanctionCheckDescripti: Verifies whether the address is subject to sanctions restrictions.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SendEvmSettings_Error_NonceUsed: An executed transaction with this nonce already exists.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SendEvmSettings_Nonce_Info: Custom nonce for EVM transactions. Controls the order of your transactions and can be used to replace pending ones.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SendEvmSettings_SlippageTolerance_Info: The maximum acceptable price deviation for your swap. Beyond this limit the transaction is reverted.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Address_ErrorMessage_BlacklistDetec: The address you entered is flagged as blacklisted. Transactions to this address could lead to loss or other risks. Please verify the recipient\'s details before proceeding.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Address_ErrorMessage_PhishingDetect: The address you entered may be fraudulent. Scammers often alter the first and last characters. Verify the full address carefully before proceeding to avoid loss.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Address_ErrorMessage_SanctionDetect: The address you entered is flagged as sanctioned. Transactions to this address could lead to loss or other risks. Please verify the recipient\'s details before proceeding.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Address_Error_InvalidAddress_Descri: Looks like this address doesn’t fit the selected network. Please double-check it.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Error_FetchFeeRateFailed_Descriptio: The connection to the server has been lost. To proceed, set up the fees manually using the data on the site.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Error_SendToSelf: Sending %s to your own address is not allowed. Please enter a different recipient address.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Error_UnsupportedAddress: Time locking works only when sending to payment addresses starting with 1... (aka BIP44 addresses)
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Fee_Info: The estimated cost of processing this transaction on the blockchain.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Hodler_Description: TimeLock works only for sending to BIP44 addresses (starting with 1)
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Rbf_Description: This option allows you to resend a stuck transaction by increasing the amount of the fee.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_RiskyAddress_AlertText: You are about to send funds to a high-risk address. Proceeding may result in loss or other security risks. By continuing, you accept the potential dangers. Are you sure you want to proceed?
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_UnexpectedError_Description: Something went wrong while sending your transaction. Please try again or copy the error code and contact support.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Utxo_Description: Manually select UTxO to spend the funds in the balance
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Send_Warning_LowFee_Description: The transaction may get stuck or fail
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SetDuressPin_Description: Set a passcode for Duress Mode
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsAddressChecker_ChainalysisCheckD: Chainalysis is a blockchain analysis platform that provides tools for tracking, investigating, and assessing the risk of cryptocurrency addresses. It helps identify addresses associated with sanctions, fraud, and other illicit activities.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsAddressChecker_HashditCheckDescr: HashDit is a security platform that allows users to check wallet addresses for risks such as sanctions and blacklist status. It helps users avoid interacting with potentially malicious or blocked addresses.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsAddressChecker_InvalidAddress: The address you entered appears to be invalid. Please double-check for typos or formatting issues and try again.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsAddressChecker_PyusdBlacklistDes: Provides a way to verify if a wallet address is blacklisted by PYUSD, issued by PayPal. Funds held at blacklisted addresses may be frozen and unusable, typically due to legal or security concerns. This tool helps ensure safer and compliant transactions with PYUSD.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsAddressChecker_TetherBlacklistDe: Allows you to verify whether a wallet address is blacklisted by Tether (USDT). If an address is blacklisted, any USDT tokens associated with it may be frozen, making them inaccessible and non-transferable. This check helps users avoid interacting with high-risk or restricted addresses.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsAddressChecker_UsdcBlacklistDesc: Enables you to check if a wallet address is blacklisted by the USDC issuer (Circle). Addresses on the blacklist may have their USDC holdings frozen due to compliance, fraud, or regulatory reasons. Using this check reduces the risk of sending funds to blocked or suspicious wallets.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_BePartOfTheFuture: Be part of the future of private finance
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateByJoiningMovement: By joining the Unstoppable movement, you stand for open and private finance:
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateBySupportingUnstopp: By supporting Unstoppable Wallet, you help us grow, improve, and stay independent.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateFeatureFullAnalytic: Full analytics and data about tokens
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateItHelpsWalletToBeAd: It helps keep the wallet ad-free, secure, and truly independent — for you and for hundreds of thousands who rely on it worldwide.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateSubtitle: Be part of the future of private finance
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateUnstoppableHasBeenF: “Unstoppable Wallet has been free, ad-free, and open-source from day one — and it will stay that way.”
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateUnstoppableWalletGi: Unstoppable Wallet gives you advanced features — with no subscription, no limits:
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_DonateYourSupportIsCommit: Your support isn’t just about unlocking features — it’s a commitment to privacy, freedom, and open access for all.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_GameDescription: Pass tests, complete tasks, and earn tokens!
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsBanner_PremiumBannerDescription: Upgrade your experience with Premium features!
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsCurrency_DisclaimerText: The exchange rate data is provided by a third party service - Coingecko.com.\n\nThe Unstoppable wallet app doesn\'t guarantee these values are always correct and matches market data. The chance for inconsistency is higher if you select any base currency other than %s.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsSecurity_AppRestartWarning: This action will restart Unstoppable Wallet.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsSecurity_HideSuspiciousTxs_Descr: Hides suspicious small transfers often used in phishing attacks.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsSecurity_TorConnectionDescriptio: Fully anonymize your internet while using this app. Note, in some cases WalletConnect feature for DeFi apps may be very slow or not work at all.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_Backup: Securely back up the recovery phrase for each wallet. It\'s the only way to regain access to your funds if the app is deleted or malfunctions. No one can restore it for you.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_DisablingPin: Disabling your smartphone\'s unlock PIN (or passcode) wipes all wallets from the app. You\'ll need your recovery phrases to restore access.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_LegalObligations: You are solely responsible for the security of your funds, your conduct, and compliance with applicable laws in your jurisdiction as well as globally.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_MonetizationDisclosure: As part of its monetization model, the app earns small commissions from DEX swaps executed within the wallet. This helps us stay independent, open source, and free of VC money.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_OpenSource: The app is verifiably open source, with all source code published online. Everything stated above can be publicly verified by anyone.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_PrivacyNotice: The app doesn\'t spy or collect data about your balances or transactions - we don\'t even know how many people use it. It only tracks anonymous usage patterns (pages opened, buttons tapped) to improve usability. You can turn this off in Settings → Privacy
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_TransactionsIrreversible: Blockchain transactions are irreversible. Always review transaction details before confirming.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_UserResponsibility: By proceeding, you acknowledge that security of your funds and legal compliance are ultimately your responsibility.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SettingsTerms_WeNotHoldingYourAssets: We do not hold your assets, access your private keys, or execute transactions on your behalf. The app does not provide brokerage, exchange, custody, escrow, or money-transmission services. All transactions are initiated, signed, and broadcast directly by you to public blockchain networks.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Settings_AutoLock_Description: Automatically locks the app after a selected time.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Settings_LaunchScreen_Tip: Choose which screen the app opens on by default.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ShareUiDataDescription: This setting lets you turn off analytics and keep your activity fully private.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.ShowKey_PrivateKeyCopyWarning_Text: As a security measure we recommend not to use copy action on private key.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.StatusInfo_ConfirmedDescription: Transaction is completed and considered permanent and irreversible.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.StatusInfo_FailedDescription: The transaction did not get processed and no value transfer took place. Depending on the fail reason, some failed transactions may consume transaction fees. Transactions that were replaced or cancelled by another transaction do not consume transaction fees and will also appear sa failed. The Unstoppable app is unable to show the reason for failed transactions, but users are able to look it up themselves on a public block explorer i.e. etherscan.io.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.StatusInfo_PendingDescription: The transaction has not been confirmed on the blockchain yet. Transactions sent with a recommended or higher fee setting are generally processed within a few minutes. Transactions sent with a low fee may remain pending for a few hours or even days, and can even be rejected. Note that status of an individual transaction in Unstoppable wallet interface typically updated with a short delay.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.StatusInfo_ProcessingDescription: The transaction has been already included in the blockchain but has not reached permanent finality. At this point, it\'s safe to consider the transaction as completed for smaller payments. For larger payments, it\'s recommended to wait until the transaction status changes to completed.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapConfirm_MevDescription: Turn on protection to secure your swap and avoid losing value to bots.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapDefense_Attention_Description: Protection is off. Bots may interfere with your swap and make you lose money.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapDefense_PriceImpact_Forbidden_Descri: This swap would result in a major loss (-%s%%) due to very low liquidity.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapDefense_PriceImpact_High_Description: You’ll lose a big part (-%s%%) of your funds on this swap.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapDefense_Safe_Description: I’m blocking bots from taking value in your swap.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapInfo_PriceImpactDescription: The expected price deviation from a shown price, typically increases with the swap amount.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapSettings_Error_SlippageTooHigh: Slippage Tolerance can’t be more than %s%%
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapSettings_Error_SlippageTooLow: Your transaction is likely to fail.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapTerms_BottomText: Always choose a swap provider that aligns with your requirements.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapTerms_RiskRestrictions_Info: I understand that some non-DEX swap providers apply transaction screening (AML). Such providers may reject (and refund) swaps, or, in rare cases (CSAM and terrorism), freeze funds and request KYC data.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapTerms_TopText: Unstoppable aggregates multiple decentralized (DEX) and centralized swap providers to offer competitive rates and broad asset support.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.SwapTerms_UserResponsibility_Info: I understand that using non-DEX providers introduces additional risks and that these risks are my responsibility. Unstoppable can not guarantee provider behavior.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Swap_AmlError_Description: Unable to get a response right now. Please try again.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Swap_AmlRisk_Description: Potential risks were identified for this transaction. During processing, your funds may be rejected or restricted. Please choose another provider.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Swap_AmlUnknown_Description: We couldn\'t complete the risk check for this transaction. If you continue, this swap may encounter delays, rejection, or restrictions during processing.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Swap_Approve_Info: Grant permission to a smart contract for token trading on your behalf, specifying the allowed amount. No impact on your balance, but incurs a small fee for approval.\n\nPre-approving a higher amount for future trades is cost-effective compared to on-demand approvals.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Swap_EstimatedTimeDescription: Approximate time to receive funds. Swap processing and transaction confirmations may take some time depending on the network and provider.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Swap_MinimumReceivedDescription: This amount is in the process of validation. As soon as the transaction status is validated you will be able to use these coins. The minimum amount a user is going
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.Swap_ProviderRisk_AlertBody: The provider for this specific swap (%s) alerted that this swap most likely will be rejected or may even get frozen. Go back and select a different swap provider.

app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_EmaAdvice: EMA 200. Determines the overall sentiment and trend. The daily price of the asset is located %1$s the EMA (%2$s). This means that globally the asset is set for %3$s.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_IndicatorsDisclaimer: Always remember to apply risk management, and note that this is not financial advice.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_InfoDescription: We use the Bollinger Bands + RSI strategy to determine trading signals. All calculations are based on daily candlesticks and provide advice for a moderately long term. The essence of the strategy is that the asset price should reach an extreme, breaking out of the Bollinger Bands channel, and the RSI should be in the overbought/oversold zone. After the price returns to the channel, there is a high probability of the price returning to the mean values or attempting to break the channel from the other side. Note that the strategy may give several false signals during strong market movements before a correct signal appears.\n\nPlease remember that it is very important to apply risk management to trading and remember to cut losses if the market situation changes!
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_MacdAdvice: MACD. Assesses the strength of the trend considering the average price change. The daily value of the histogram is %1$s (%2$s). The price of the asset globally may move %3$s.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_NeutralAdvice: In general, the asset price is moving towards averaging and further movement is possible in any direction.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_NeutralIndicators: the asset was in the overbought/oversold zone, but at the moment the price has returned to the Bollinger Band channel in the neutral zone. The RSI is %s also confirms the absence of a strong trend, so overall the asset price is moving towards averaging and further movement is possible in any direction.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_OverAdvice: There might be a strong %sward movement, so it\'s better to wait for the asset price to return to the channel.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_OverIndicators: The asset is outside the Bollinger Band channel and %s.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_OverMain: The actions with the asset are risky.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_OverRsi: RSI = %1$s, This also indicates that the asset is %2$s.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_StableRsi: Meanwhile, the RSI is %s, which also indicates a trend reversal (RSI crossed the boundary at 70\%%).
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_StrongAdvice: This could be a very strong signal to enter the market. Keep in mind that there may be several attempts of %sward movement after returning to the channel, so do not forget about risk management.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_StrongIndicators: the asset was %s, but now it has returned to the Bollinger Band channel. This indicates a possible trend reversal.
app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.TechnicalAdvice_StrongRsi: Meanwhile, the RSI is %1$s, which still indicates that it is %2$s.
